title: kelleria lyallii
intro: Kelleria lyallii, also known as the New Zealand broom, is a flowering shrub native to the island of New Zealand. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Kelleria lyallii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its ability to relieve digestive issues. Kelleria lyallii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
